form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr4) over 1760m at Junee was 8th-16.4 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $34. At his previous start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 30 m by Goodtime Jazzi (2:12.40) in NR 33 to 35 on March 17 at $101. From a low draw is expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 5th-6 beaten 9 m by Jungle Shark (2:13.40) in NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $11. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1635m at this track, at the bell was 5th-12.2 beaten 19 m by Bettes Blue Violet (1:58.20) in NR up to 47 M on March 3 at $16. Expected to play a major role.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 1760m at Junee beaten 24 m by Goodtime Jazzi (2:12.40) in NR 33 to 35 on March 17 at $61. Before that, was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 1758m at Leeton, at the bell was 7th-17.1 beaten 12 m by Wongalea Meg (2:13.10) in NR 34 to 35 on March 10 at $16. Finds the right race this time.

Open to plenty of improvement.

Checked rounding the first turn when Like No Other broke gait.
Yielded ground from the 400m to finish in 10th and last position beaten 61.1m.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1760m at Junee was 6th-8 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Jungle Shark (2:13.40) in NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $7.50. The run before 6th (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early pace at Young was 3rd-4.1 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $5.50. Can do much better from the same draw.
